0.q: The betaine accumulation was higher in transformed tobacco than in untransformed tobacco; transgenic plants expressing BADH had 2.4 to 3.2 µmol g-1 fresh wt.

1.q: Sl NAC10 as a transcription factor improves salt and drought tolerance in plants possibly by regulating proline synthesis.

2.q: Betaine aldehyde dehydrogenase (BADH, E.C.1.2.1.8) catalyzes the conversion of betaine aldehyde to betaine.

3.q: SlNAC1 functions as a stress-responsive NAC protein involved in the abscisic acid-dependent signaling pathway and enhances transgenic Arabidopsis drought, salt, and cold stress tolerance.

4.q: These results suggested that SlPAPA1 functions as a stress-responsive zinc-finger HIT protein involved in the ABA-dependent signaling pathway

5.q: SlNAC1 functions as a stress-responsive NAC protein involved in the abscisic acid-dependent signaling pathway and enhances transgenic Arabidopsis drought, salt, and cold stress tolerance.
